ZTE Corporation
ZXA10 C320 Alarm Management Reference
OID enterprise prefix: 1.3.6.1.4.1.3902

Code   Name             Severity   Description
33001  ONU_LOS          critical   Loss of optical signal on the ONU.
Description: The OLT detects loss of signal from the ONU.
Probable Causes: Fiber cut; ONU powered off; dirty connector
Remediation: Check fiber continuity; verify ONU power; clean connector

33024  ONU_DYING_GASP   major      ONU reported a dying gasp power loss.
Description: The ONU lost power and sent a dying gasp.
Probable Causes: Power outage at customer premises
Remediation: Verify customer power supply
